basics.name: Vishwatej Khot
basics.title: AI Engineer
basics.summary: AI Engineer with 2 years of experience building production-grade ML and Generative AI systems, including RAG pipelines, multi-agent LLM orchestration, and scalable data extraction workflows. Proven ability to take models from research to deployment with measurable business impact across healthcare, security, and enterprise automation.

bullets: Developed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using LangChain and LLaMA to accelerate and enhance data retrieval from large PDF corpora.
Integrated NLP-driven automation for document analysis, reducing manual processing effort by 40% while improving consistency and throughput.
Built summarization, tagging, and data-extraction pipelines to convert unstructured PDFs into structured, searchable knowledge bases.
Engineered NeRF and Gaussian Splatting pipelines for advanced 3D scene reconstruction from high-quality 4D datasets using Blender.
Enhanced volumetric rendering performance and contributed to internal tooling for workflow documentation and model experimentation, improving iteration speed by 30%.
Supported development of structured internal systems, relevant to VC operations and AI-based experimentation.
Built DocAssist, a Generative AI-powered healthcare tool to automate medical documentation and assist diagnostic decisions.
Created data workflows, summarization engines, and structured knowledge modules for intelligent automation and reporting.
Applied LLMs for building tools that support dealflow tracking and portfolio analysis in VC-like workflows.
Automated technical datasheet management using a Generative AI pipeline to replace Excel-based systems with structured databases.
Designed internal dashboards and reporting workflows, improving team productivity and information traceability.
Delivered solutions aligned with VC portfolio management tools, automated reporting, and internal knowledge systems.

achievements.title: Smart India Hackathon
achievements.context: Secured 8th position at the college level

projects.title: Autonomous API reverse engineering system
projects.description: Designed and deployed an autonomous API reverse-engineering system to reconstruct undocumented endpoints from raw HTTP traffic. Built a multi-agent LLaMA-3 pipeline with FAISS indexing and continuous contract validation, reducing API drift incidents by 80% across distributed services.

projects.title: Skin Cancer Detection
projects.description: Developed and deployed a CNN-based skin cancer detection system optimized for high-accuracy, low-latency inference in production. Trained models on AWS EC2 GPU infrastructure with datasets managed in S3, and integrated Explainable AI for transparent predictions, reducing manual clinician review by 35%. Implemented end-to-end monitoring and logging with CloudWatch to ensure observability and reliability in real-world healthcare workflows.

projects.title: Multiclass Malware Detection
projects.description: Developed a multiclass malware detection system using a modified DeeperGCN architecture to model structural patterns in executable data. Built scalable feature pipelines by transforming raw BYTE files into image-based representations, and integrated Explainable AI with LLaMA-3.1–assisted analysis to generate actionable threat insights, reducing security analyst investigation time by 45%.

projects.title: AegisAI – Self-Healing Enterprise RAG System
projects.description: Designed and deployed a production-grade, self-healing RAG system for enterprise document Q&A. Implemented vector-based retrieval with confidence scoring, safety enforcement, and non-blocking self-healing workflows, reducing hallucination-related failures by 40% under low-context scenarios. Delivered a Flask-based API and UI with monitoring and audit logs, improving answer reliability and system robustness across uncertain inputs.

education.institution: Marathwada Mitra Mandal College Of Engineering Pune

extra.title: Frontiers of Innovation: Exploring Emerging Technologies and Computing about Project Multiclass Malware Detection by using Modified GNN and Explainable AI
